CREATE TABLE binary_trace (address UInt64, info String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT addressToLineWithInlines(arrayJoin(trace) AS ta) FROM system.trace_log WHERE query_id = '5e173544-2020-45de-b645-5deebe2aae54';
WITH (SELECT address FROM binary_trace WHERE address > 0) AS valid_addrs SELECT addressToLineWithInlines(valid_addrs) FROM valid_addrs;
CREATE TABLE inline_functions (id UInt64, func_name String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT addressToLineWithInlines(t.address) FROM binary_trace t JOIN inline_functions i ON t.address = i.id;
WITH (SELECT address FROM binary_trace LIMIT 1) AS single_addr SELECT addressToLineWithInlines(single_addr) FROM single_addr;
SELECT arrayJoin(addressToLineWithInlines(address)) AS details FROM binary_trace WHERE address IN (SELECT address FROM binary_trace WHERE address < 1000000000);
